moments.title: Wimbledon Championships LIVE
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, is officially underway at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Opening shots
angles.copy: Centre Court is calling! Wimbledon 2026 is officially LIVE. Who are you backing for the title this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's not truly summer until Wimbledon starts. Time for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis action!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across Canada, Mexico, and the USA, is currently in full swing, having kicked off on June 11 and continuing until July 19.

angles.name: Tournament energy
angles.copy: World Cup fever is gripping the globe! Who's impressed you most in the group stages so far?

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England's World Cup journey continues! Will this be the year football finally comes home?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival 2026 Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival 2026 concluded on Sunday, June 28th, after a weekend of iconic performances and memorable moments at Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Glasto Recap
angles.copy: The mud has settled and the tents are packed away. What was your highlight from Glastonbury 2026?

angles.name: Best Set
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Glastonbury? Which artist absolutely smashed their set this year?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is preparing for TRNSMT Festival, set to bring big names to Scotland from July 11th-13th, 2026.

angles.name: TRNSMT Excitement
angles.copy: Less than two weeks until TRNSMT takes over Glasgow Green! Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready, Scotland! TRNSMT is almost here. Who's got their tickets and is ready to rock?

moments.title: Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' holds UK No. 1
moments.blurb: Sabrina Carpenter's hit single 'Espresso' continues its reign at the top of the UK Official Singles Chart, making it a dominant force this summer.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still sipping on 'Espresso'! Sabrina Carpenter holds strong at UK Number 1. Is it your song of the summer?

angles.name: Summer Anthem
angles.copy: Sabrina Carpenter's 'Espresso' is the undeniable sound of summer 2026, still topping the charts! What other tracks are on your summer playlist?

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday (July 1st)
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow, July 1st, 2026.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the legendary Debbie Harry turning 81! What's your all-time favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still setting trends after all these years.

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday (July 1st)
moments.blurb: The groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 tomorrow, July 1st, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the incredible Missy Elliott's 55th birthday! What's your favourite track from the Queen of Hip-Hop?

angles.name: Work It
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th birthday for tomorrow to the visionary Missy Elliott. Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Ashley Tisdale's 41st Birthday (July 2nd)
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, known for 'High School Musical' and 'The Suite Life of Zack & Cody', turns 41 on July 2nd, 2026.

angles.name: High School Musical Star
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday on Thursday to the one and only Ashley Tisdale! Which of her iconic roles is your favourite?

angles.name: Sharpay Forever
angles.copy: Troy Bolton, eat your heart out! Wishing a fabulous 41st birthday to Ashley Tisdale this Thursday. Still our favourite diva!

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday (July 4th)
moments.blurb: Multi-genre artist Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles', celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th, 2026.

angles.name: Posty Party
angles.copy: Happy 31st birthday to the one and only Post Malone this Saturday! What track of his are you blasting today?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday this weekend! From hip-hop to country, he does it all. Which era of Posty is your favourite?

moments.title: Huey Lewis's 76th Birthday (July 5th)
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, lead singer of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 'The Power of Love', turns 76 on July 5th, 2026.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's the heart of rock & roll! Happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis this Sunday. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

angles.name: Back To The Future
angles.copy: Great Scott! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis on Sunday. Still got 'The Power of Love'!

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st Birthday (July 6th)
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th, 2026.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to 50 Cent on Monday. What's your go-to track?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the one and only 50 Cent this Monday! Still running the game.

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday (July 7th)
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr next Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his drumming?

angles.name: Octopus's Garden
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr next Tuesday! Still making music and spreading joy.

moments.title: Beck's 56th Birthday (July 8th)
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician Beck, known for his eclectic and innovative sound, turns 56 on July 8th, 2026.

angles.name: Lo-Fi Legend
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the unique and brilliant Beck next Wednesday! What's your favourite track from his incredible discography?

angles.name: Genre Chameleon
angles.copy: Celebrating 56 years of musical innovation! Happy birthday to Beck next Wednesday. From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', he's constantly evolving.

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday (July 9th)
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the fierce and unforgettable Courtney Love next Thursday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Live Through This
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd birthday to rock icon Courtney Love next Thursday! Her impact on music and culture is undeniable.

moments.title: Jessica Simpson's 46th Birthday (July 10th)
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson turns 46 on July 10th, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 46th birthday to the lovely Jessica Simpson next Friday! Which of her hits takes you back?

angles.name: I Wanna Love You Forever
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 46th birthday to Jessica Simpson next Friday! From pop star to fashion mogul, she's done it all.

moments.title: Exeter Craft Festival
moments.blurb: The Exeter Craft Festival, showcasing local artisans and makers, takes place from July 4th-6th, 2026 in Exeter Cathedral Green.

angles.name: Local Craft Focus
angles.copy: This weekend, Exeter Cathedral Green comes alive with the Exeter Craft Festival! Support local makers and find something unique.

angles.name: Weekend Plans Exeter
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans in Exeter? Head to the Cathedral Green for the Exeter Craft Festival, running Friday to Sunday!
